dict.string: TheWatch requires continuous location access because the application depends on active voice tracking for safety and security. Your location is used to geo-tag incidents and enable real-time responder positioning during emergencies.

TheWatch requires always-on location access because the application depends on active voice tracking for safety and security. Continuous location monitoring ensures accurate incident positioning even when the app is in the background.
TheWatch uses your location to geo-tag incidents and enable responder positioning for safety and security.

TheWatch requires microphone access because the application depends on active voice tracking for safety and security. The microphone listens for emergency activation phrases to enable hands-free incident reporting, including from the lockscreen.

TheWatch uses on-device speech recognition because the application depends on active voice tracking for safety and security. Speech recognition processes activation phrases locally to detect emergencies in real time.
